attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
	SALES_ADJ_LINE.BK_SALES_ADJ_LINE_NUMBER_INT,
	SALES_ADJ_LINE.PROCESS_DATE,
	POS_TRAN_LINE.BK_END_USER_WIPS_SITE_USE_KEY,
	'POS_ADJ' BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE

FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ADJUSTMENT_LINE SALES_ADJ_LINE
INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_POS_TRANSACTION_LINE POS_TRAN_LINE
	ON  	SALES_ADJ_LINE.RU_BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT = POS_TRAN_LINE.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT

INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ADJUSTMENT SALES_ADJ
	ON  SALES_ADJ_LINE.BK_SALES_ADJ_NUMBER_INT = SALES_ADJ.BK_SALES_ADJ_NUMBER_INT
	AND SALES_ADJ.BK_SALES_ADJ_TYPE_CODE = 'POS'
AND SALES_ADJ.BK_SALES_ADJ_CODE<>'POS-OA'                /* Added as part of Q1FY15 - OA*/
WHERE
	POS_TRAN_LINE.EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME  >'$$LastExtractDate'
/*  Removed the below query as part of Q3 FY15 --OA
	/*Added as part of Q1FY15 - OA 
UNION ALL

SELECT 
	SALES_ADJ_LINE.BK_SALES_ADJ_LINE_NUMBER_INT,
	SALES_ADJ_LINE.PROCESS_DATE,
	POS_TRAN_LINE.BK_END_USER_WIPS_SITE_USE_KEY,
	'POS' BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE

FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ADJUSTMENT_LINE SALES_ADJ_LINE
INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_POS_TRANSACTION_LINE POS_TRAN_LINE
	ON  	SALES_ADJ_LINE.RU_BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT = POS_TRAN_LINE.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT

INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ADJUSTMENT SALES_ADJ
	ON  SALES_ADJ_LINE.BK_SALES_ADJ_NUMBER_INT = SALES_ADJ.BK_SALES_ADJ_NUMBER_INT
	AND SALES_ADJ.BK_SALES_ADJ_TYPE_CODE = 'POS'
	AND SALES_ADJ.BK_SALES_ADJ_CODE='POS-OA'
WHERE
	POS_TRAN_LINE.EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME  >'$$LastExtractDate'
	*/

SELECT 
    NBM.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY, 
    NBM.SALES_ORDER_KEY,
    NBM.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY, 
    NBM.PRODUCT_KEY, 
    NBM.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY, 
    NBM.AR_TRX_KEY, 
    NBM.END_CUSTOMER_KEY, 
    NBM.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY, 
    NBM.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY, 
    NBM.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY, 
    NBM.TRANSACTION_DATETIME, 
    NBM.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY, 
    NBM.SALES_REP_NUMBER, 
    NBM.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE, 
    NBM.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT, 
    NBM.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT, 
    NBM.BK_SALES_ADJ_LINE_NUMBER_INT, 
    NBM.BK_SALES_ADJ_NUMBER_INT, 
    NBM.ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CODE, 
    NBM.SALES_CHANNEL_CODE, 
    NBM.SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE, 
    NBM.IDE_ADJUSTMENT_CODE, 
    NBM.ADJUSTMENT_CODE, 
    NBM.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE, 
    NBM.CANCELLED_FLG, 
    NBM.ACQUISITION_FLG, 
    NBM.FORWARD_REVERSE_FLG, 
    NBM.DISTRIBUTOR_OFFSET_FLG, 
    NBM.CORPORATE_BOOKINGS_FLG, 
    NBM.OVERLAY_FLG, 
    NBM.IC_REVENUE_FLG, 
    NBM.CHARGES_FLG, 
    NBM.SALESREP_FLG, 
    NBM.MISC_FLG, 
    NBM.SERVICE_FLG, 
    NBM.INTERNATIONAL_DEMO_FLG, 
    NBM.REPLACEMENT_DEMO_FLG,
    NBM.REVENUE_FLG, 
    NBM.RMA_FLG, 
    NBM.TRADE_IN_AMOUNT, 
    NBM.DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT, 
    NBM.DD_COMP_US_LIST_PRICE_AMOUNT, 
    NBM.DD_COMP_US_COST_AMOUNT, 
    NBM.DD_EXTENDED_QUANTITY, 
    NBM.DD_COMP_US_HOLD_NET_PRICE_AMT, 
    NBM.DD_COMP_US_HOLD_LIST_PRICE_AMT, 
    NBM.DD_COMP_US_HOLD_COST_AMOUNT, 
    NBM.DD_EXTENDED_HOLD_QUANTITY, 
    NBM.DD_COMP_US_STANDARD_PRICE_AMT, 
    NBM.WIPS_ORIGINATOR_ID_INT, 
    NBM.DV_END_CUSTOMER_KEY,
    NBM.CANCEL_CODE,
    NBM.EDW_CREATE_USER, 
    NBM.EDW_UPDATE_USER, 
    NBM.EDW_CREATE_DATETIME, 
    NBM.EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME, 
    NBM.CONVERSION_RT, 
    NBM.DD_CISCO_BOOKED_DTM, 
    NBM.DD_BK_SO_NUMBER_INT,
    NBM.DD_SLS_ORD_OPERATING_UNIT_CD,
    NBM.ADJUSTMENT_DESCR_KEY,
    NBM.DD_TRX_CURRENCY_CD,
    NBM.DV_TRANSACTION_TYPE,
    NBM.DD_SALES_ORDER_CATEGORY_TYPE,
    NBM.CONVERSION_DT,
    NBM.DV_TRANSACTION_NAME,  /**R9**/
    NBM.BOOKINGS_SPLIT_PCT,   /**R9**/
    BARI.END_CUSTOMER_KEY NEW_END_CUSTOMER_KEY,
    NBM.DV_REVENUE_RECOGNITION_FLG,  /* Added as part of true demand bkgs definition*/    
    NBM.DV_NET_SPREAD_FLG,            /* Added as part of true demand bkgs definition*/
          /*Added as part of Q1FY15- OA*/
    NBM.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD,
    NBM.DV_PRODUCT_KEY,
    NBM.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
    NBM.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT,
    NBM.RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_START_DTM,/*Added as part of Q1FY16 AUG CD ICPM*/
   NBM.RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_END_DTM ,/*Added as part of Q1FY16 AUG CD ICPM*/
   NBM.DV_CONTRACT_DURATION ,/*Added as part of Q1FY16  AUG CD ICPM*/
   NBM.DV_ANNUALIZED_FLG ,/*Added as part of Q1FY16 AUG CD ICPM*/
   NBM.DV_ANNUALIZED_US_NET_AMT,/*Added as part of Q1FY16 AUG CD ICPM*/
   NBM.DV_MULTIYEAR_US_NET_AMT,/*Added as part of Q1FY16 AUG CD ICPM*/
    NBM.DSV_FLG, /*Added as part of Q1FY15-DSV*/
       NBM.DV_SOURCE_ORDER_NUM_INT, /*Added as part of Q1FY15-DSV*/
  NBM.DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY,/*Added as part of Q3FY16-Offer Attribution*/
  NBM.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY, /*Added as part of Q3FY16-Offer Attribution*/
  COALESCE(NBM.DV_DEAL_ID,-9999) AS  DV_DEAL_ID /*added for DEAL_ID*/  ,
  /*Added as part of BGM Q1FY17*/
NBM.TSS_COUNTRY_FACTOR_KEY, 
 NBM.DV_BKG_GROSS_MGN_AMOUNT,
 NBM.DV_BGM_FX_COST_AMOUNT,
 NBM.DV_FX_NET_PRICE_AMT,
NBM.DV_LOCAL_EXTND_LIST_PRICE_AMT ,
 NBM.LOCAL_UNIT_LIST_PRICE_AMT     ,
 NBM.DV_UNIT_LIST_PRICE_USD_AMT  ,
NBM.DV_BGM_NON_STANDARD_COST_AMT, /*added as part product BGM - Q1FY18 release */
 NBM.POB_TYPE_CD, /*agannava:added as part of NRS*/
 NBM.DV_BKG_REBATE_AMT,
 NBM.DV_FX_REBATE_PRICE_AMT,
SK_SALES_MOTION_ATTRIB_KEY, /* Added as part of SALES FY18 May12Rel */
/* added as part of ACV - MAY release */
NBM.SALES_COMPENSATION_POLICY_CODE,
NBM.DV_INV_DTM,
NBM.DV_COMPENSATION_DTM
,NBM.DISTI_ENRICH_CONTRACT_DURATION
,NBM.TRANSACTION_AI_FLG
,NBM.AI_INTENT_TYPE_CD
,NBM.TRX_AI_PRODUCT_CLASS_NAME
FROM
    $$SLSORDVWDB.N_BOOKINGS_MEASURE NBM,
    $$STGDB.WI_N_BOOKINGS_ADJ_RETRO_INT BARI
   WHERE
    NBM.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY = BARI.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY AND 
    NBM.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE = BARI.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE AND 
    NBM.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE = BARI.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE

/*SELECT 
	POS_DETAIL.ALLOCATED_POS_ADJ_KEY,
	POS_DETAIL.PROCESS_DATE,
	POS_TRANS.BK_END_USER_WIPS_SITE_USE_KEY,
	'POS' BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE
FROM 	
$$SLSORDVWDB.N_POS_TRANSACTION_LINE POS_TRANS,
$$SLSORDVWDB.N_DRVD_SCA_POS_ADJ_DETAILS POS_DETAIL
WHERE 
	POS_DETAIL.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT = POS_TRANS.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT AND 
	POS_TRANS.EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME > '$$LastExtractDate' */

/*commented this logic as this retro update is taken care in pre sq of wf_MT_DRVD_NRT_POS_TRX*/

SELECT POS_DETAIL.ALLOCATED_POS_ADJ_KEY,
	POS_DETAIL.PROCESS_DATE,
      -999 AS END_CUSTOMER_KEY,
	'POS' BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE FROM 
	$$SLSORDVWDB.N_DRVD_SCA_POS_ADJ_DETAILS POS_DETAIL
	WHERE 1=2

SELECT 
 WINBAR.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY, 
 WINBAR.SALES_ORDER_KEY, 
 WINBAR.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY, 
 WINBAR.PRODUCT_KEY, 
 WINBAR.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY, 
 WINBAR.AR_TRX_KEY, 
 WINBAR.NEW_END_CUSTOMER_KEY AS END_CUSTOMER_KEY, 
 WINBAR.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY, 
 WINBAR.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY, 
 WINBAR.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY, 
 CASE 
 WHEN WINBAR.DV_END_CUSTOMER_KEY = -888 
 THEN WINBAR.DV_END_CUSTOMER_KEY 
 ELSE WINBAR.NEW_END_CUSTOMER_KEY 
 END AS DV_END_CUSTOMER_KEY, 
 WINBAR.TRANSACTION_DATETIME, 
 WINBAR.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY, 
 WINBAR.SALES_REP_NUMBER, 
 WINBAR.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE, 
 WINBAR.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT, 
 WINBAR.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT, 
 WINBAR.BK_SALES_ADJ_LINE_NUMBER_INT, 
 WINBAR.BK_SALES_ADJ_NUMBER_INT, 
 WINBAR.ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CODE, 
 WINBAR.SALES_CHANNEL_CODE, 
 WINBAR.SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE, 
 WINBAR.IDE_ADJUSTMENT_CODE, 
 WINBAR.ADJUSTMENT_CODE, 
 WINBAR.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE, 
 WINBAR.CANCELLED_FLG, 
 WINBAR.CANCEL_CODE,
 WINBAR.ACQUISITION_FLG, 
 WINBAR.FORWARD_REVERSE_FLG, 
 WINBAR.DISTRIBUTOR_OFFSET_FLG, 
 WINBAR.CORPORATE_BOOKINGS_FLG,
 WINBAR.OVERLAY_FLG, 
 WINBAR.IC_REVENUE_FLG, 
 WINBAR.CHARGES_FLG, 
 WINBAR.SALESREP_FLG, 
 WINBAR.MISC_FLG, 
 WINBAR.SERVICE_FLG, 
 WINBAR.INTERNATIONAL_DEMO_FLG, 
 WINBAR.REPLACEMENT_DEMO_FLG, 
 WINBAR.REVENUE_FLG, 
 WINBAR.RMA_FLG, 
 WINBAR.TRADE_IN_AMOUNT, 
 WINBAR.DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT, 
 WINBAR.DD_COMP_US_LIST_PRICE_AMOUNT,
 WINBAR.DD_COMP_US_COST_AMOUNT, 
 WINBAR.DD_EXTENDED_QUANTITY, 
 WINBAR.DD_COMP_US_HOLD_NET_PRICE_AMT, 
 WINBAR.DD_COMP_US_HOLD_LIST_PRICE_AMT, 
 WINBAR.DD_COMP_US_HOLD_COST_AMOUNT, 
 WINBAR.DD_EXTENDED_HOLD_QUANTITY, 
 WINBAR.DD_COMP_US_STANDARD_PRICE_AMT, 
 WINBAR.WIPS_ORIGINATOR_ID_INT, 
 WINBAR.EDW_CREATE_USER, 
 WINBAR.EDW_UPDATE_USER, 
 WINBAR.EDW_CREATE_DATETIME, 
 CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME, 
 WINBAR.CONVERSION_RT,
 WINBAR.CONVERSION_DT,
 WINBAR.DD_BK_SO_NUMBER_INT,
 WINBAR.DD_CISCO_BOOKED_DTM, 
 WINBAR.DD_SALES_ORDER_CATEGORY_TYPE,
 WINBAR.DD_SLS_ORD_OPERATING_UNIT_CD,
 WINBAR.DD_TRX_CURRENCY_CD,
 WINBAR.DV_TRANSACTION_TYPE,
 WINBAR.ADJUSTMENT_DESCR_KEY,
 'I' ACTION_CODE,
 'I'  DML_TYPE,
 WINBAR.DV_TRANSACTION_NAME,
 WINBAR.BOOKINGS_SPLIT_PCT,
 WINBAR.DV_REVENUE_RECOGNITION_FLG,  /* Added as part of true demand bkgs definition*/ 
 WINBAR.DV_NET_SPREAD_FLG,     /* Added as part of true demand bkgs definition*/
 /*OA columns data derived from WI_N_BOOKINGS_ADJ_RETRO and not Defaulted - changed as part of Q1FY15 OA */
 WINBAR.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD, 
 WINBAR.DV_PRODUCT_KEY AS DV_PRODUCT_KEY,
 WINBAR.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY AS DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
 WINBAR.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT AS SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT ,
 WINBAR.RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_START_DTM,/*Added as part of Q1FY16 AUG CD ICPM*/
 WINBAR.RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_END_DTM ,/*Added as part of Q1FY16 AUG CD ICPM*/
 WINBAR.DV_CONTRACT_DURATION ,/*Added as part of Q1FY16 AUG CD ICPM*/
 WINBAR.DV_ANNUALIZED_FLG ,/*Added as part of Q1FY16 AUG CD ICPM*/
 WINBAR.DV_ANNUALIZED_US_NET_AMT,/*Added as part of Q1FY16 AUG CD ICPM*/
 WINBAR.DV_MULTIYEAR_US_NET_AMT,/*Added as part of Q1FY16 AUG CD ICPM*/
 WINBAR.DSV_FLG, /*Added as part of Q1FY15-DSV*/
 WINBAR.DV_SOURCE_ORDER_NUM_INT /*Added as part of Q1FY15-DSV*/
 ,CAL.FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUMBER_INT
 ,WINBAR.DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY/*Added as part of Q3FY16-Offer Attribution*/
 ,WINBAR.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY /*Added as part of Q3FY16-Offer Attribution*/
 ,WINBAR.BK_DEAL_ID AS  DV_DEAL_ID /*added for DEAL_ID*/  
 /*  Q1FY17 BGM changes starts here */
 , WINBAR. TSS_COUNTRY_FACTOR_KEY   AS TSS_COUNTRY_FACTOR_KEY
 , WINBAR. DV_BKG_GROSS_MGN_AMOUNT AS BKG_GROSS_MGN_AMOUNT
 , WINBAR.DV_BGM_FX_COST_AMOUNT AS BGM_COST_AMOUNT
 , WINBAR.DV_FX_NET_PRICE_AMT AS DV_FX_NET_PRICE_AMT
 /*  Q1FY17 BGM changes ends here */
 , WINBAR.DV_BKG_REBATE_AMT AS DV_BKG_REBATE_AMT
 , WINBAR.DV_FX_REBATE_PRICE_AMT AS DV_FX_REBATE_PRICE_AMT
  ,WINBAR.DV_LOCAL_EXTND_LIST_PRICE_AMT 
 ,WINBAR.LOCAL_UNIT_LIST_PRICE_AMT     
 ,WINBAR.DV_UNIT_LIST_PRICE_USD_AMT
 ,CAST(0.0 AS DECIMAL(18,6))DV_ORDER_VALUE_USD_AMOUNT    
 ,CAST(0.0 AS DECIMAL(18,6))DV_MTHLY_RCR_REV_TRXL_USD_AMT  
 ,CAST(0.0 AS DECIMAL(18,6))DV_INCRML_MTHY_RCRR_RV_USD_AMT 
 ,CAST(0.0 AS DECIMAL(18,6))DV_ANNLZD_MTHY_RCRR_RV_USD_AMT 
 ,CAST(0.0 AS DECIMAL(18,6))DV_INCRML_ANNL_RCRR_RV_USD_AMT 
 ,CAST(0.0 AS DECIMAL(26,7))DV_PURCHASE_ADJ_DSCNT_USD_AMT /*Q1FY18*/
 ,WINBAR.DV_BGM_NON_STANDARD_COST_AMT /*added as part product BGM - Q1FY18 release */
 ,WINBAR.POB_TYPE_CD, /*agannava:added as part of NRS*/ 
 SK_SALES_MOTION_ATTRIB_KEY /* Added as part of SALES FY18 May12Rel */
 /* Added as part ACV - May release */
 ,WINBAR.SALES_COMPENSATION_POLICY_CODE
 ,WINBAR.DV_INV_DTM
 ,WINBAR.DV_COMPENSATION_DTM
 ,WINBAR.DISTI_ENRICH_CONTRACT_DURATION
 ,WINBAR.TRANSACTION_AI_FLG
,WINBAR.AI_INTENT_TYPE_CD
,WINBAR.TRX_AI_PRODUCT_CLASS_NAME
FROM $$STGDB.WI_N_BOOKINGS_ADJ_RETRO  WINBAR
 
 INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_DAY_TO_YEAR CAL  /*added this join to derive new column quarter number*/
 ON WINBAR.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE=CAL.CALENDAR_DATE 
 
 WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$WORKDB.W_BOOKINGS_MEASURE WBM
 WHERE  WBM.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY = WINBAR.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY AND
 WBM.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE = WINBAR.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE AND
 WBM.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE = WINBAR.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE)
